memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my term project is barely started. I might choose the relaxing leisure option instead of tackling the urgent deadline.
I see that working early reduces later stress, but the project remains at the start. My low energy and sleep debt make continuing difficult right now.
I made significant progress on the term project, doubling my completion rate in two hours despite low energy and high stress.
I made significant progress on the term project, doubling my completion rate in two hours despite low energy and high stress.
I worked another 1.5 hours, pushing the project to 65% completion while still carrying a 2-hour sleep debt and moderate stress.
I made good term project progress but failed an easy chore. My high stress and sleep debt remain unchanged.
I advanced the term project from 73% to 77% in one hour, despite zero energy and high stress. Sleep debt remains at two hours with no change.
I gained 0.04 project progress in one hour while at zero energy and with two hours of sleep debt.
After only 4 hours of sleep, my energy recovered to 4.8 and stress dropped below 3, yet I still have zero project progress despite previous gains.
I finished the term project at 99% completion, reversing previous stagnation despite low energy and sleep debt. This confirms I can complete major tasks even when fatigued.
I completed a trivial chore with minimal progress, yet my energy remains high and stress is low. This suggests I can handle small tasks even when fatigued.
I finished the term project in just 2 hours with full energy, confirming I can complete major tasks even when fatigued.
